positive: A stunning, highly detailed central composition of a stylized celestial tapestry intersecting with deep rainforest flora. Focus on luminous, bioluminescent elements, such as glowing fireflies and delicate constellations forming within oversized monstera leaves and fern fronds. Use a palette of deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and pops of glowing gold. The style should be intricate neo-tribal linework mixed with ethereal stained glass aesthetics, ensuring clean, solid color areas and strong, clear silhouettes. High contrast, perfect for direct screen printing on fabric. Volumetric lighting, dreamlike atmosphere, symmetrical composition.
